table.style: width: 100%; margin: 0; border-collapse: collapse; table-layout: fixed;

th.style: width: 10%; text-align: center; height: 22px; padding: 2px 4px; border-top: 1px solid #000; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px solid #000; border-right: 1px solid #000;
width: 40%; text-align: center; height: 22px; padding: 2px 4px; border-top: 1px solid #000; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px solid #000; border-right: 1px solid #000;
width: 20%; text-align: center; height: 22px; padding: 2px 4px; border-top: 1px solid #000; border-bottom: none; border-left: 1px solid #000; border-right: 1px solid #000;
width: 15%; text-align: center; height: 22px; padding: 2px 4px; border-top: 1px solid #000; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px solid #000; border-right: 1px solid #000;
width: 15%; text-align: center; height: 22px; padding: 2px 4px; border-top: 1px solid #000; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px solid #000; border-right: 1px solid #000;
width: 10%; border-top: none; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px solid #000; border-right: 1px solid #000;
width: 10%; border-top: none; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px solid #000; border-right: 1px solid #000;

td.t-attf-style: text-align: center; height: 22px; padding: 2px 4px; border-top: none; border-bottom: #{fill_border}; border-left: 1px solid #000; border-right: 1px solid #000;
text-align: left; height: 22px; padding: 2px 4px; border-top: none; border-bottom: #{fill_border}; border-left: 1px solid #000; border-right: 1px solid #000;
text-align: center; height: 22px; padding: 2px 4px; border-top: none; border-bottom: #{fill_border}; border-left: 1px solid #000; border-right: 1px solid #000;
text-align: center; height: 22px; padding: 2px 4px; border-top: none; border-bottom: #{fill_border}; border-left: 1px solid #000; border-right: 1px solid #000;

td.style: text-align: right; height: 22px; padding: 2px 4px; border-top: none; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px solid #000; border-right: 1px solid #000;
text-align: right; height: 22px; padding: 2px 4px; border-top: none; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px solid #000; border-right: 1px solid #000;

div.style: width: 70%; float: left; box-sizing: border-box; vertical-align: top; padding: 6px 4px; font-weight: regular; font-size: 8.8pt; border-top: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px solid #000;
div.span: Accordling to general Conditions ORGALIME S2000-M2000
Cancellation : Cancellation of order is subject to charge 25% based on order value

div.style: width: 50%; float: left; box-sizing: border-box; padding: 4px; font-weight: regular; white-space: pre-line; font-size: 7.92pt;
width: 50%; float: left; box-sizing: border-box; padding: 4px; font-weight: regular; white-space: pre-line; font-size: 7.92pt;

td.style: text-align: left; height: 22px; padding: 2px 4px; border-top: 1px solid #000; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px solid #000; border-right: 1px solid #000;
text-align: right; height: 22px; padding: 2px 4px; border-top: 1px solid #000; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px solid #000; border-right: 1px solid #000;
text-align: left; height: 22px; padding: 2px 4px; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px solid #000; border-right: 1px solid #000;
text-align: right; height: 22px; padding: 2px 4px; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px solid #000; border-right: 1px solid #000;
text-align: left; height: 22px; padding: 2px 4px; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px solid #000; border-right: 1px solid #000;
text-align: right; height: 22px; padding: 2px 4px; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px solid #000; border-right: 1px solid #000;
text-align: left; height: 22px; padding: 2px 4px; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px solid #000; border-right: 1px solid #000;
text-align: right; height: 22px; padding: 2px 4px; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px solid #000; border-right: 1px solid #000;
text-align: left; height: 22px; padding: 2px 4px; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px solid #000; border-right: 1px solid #000;
text-align: right; height: 22px; padding: 2px 4px; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px solid #000; border-right: 1px solid #000;
